title: manual: Cannot `make manual`: missing `APPNOTE_010_Verilog_to_BLIF.pdf`
body:
Steps to reproduce:
----

Install `texlive-full` and the luximono font.  Clone the master branch from scratch in a temporary directory.  `make && sudo make install`.  All goes well up to here.

Now try to build the manual PDF: `make manual`.

Expected result:
----

Successful creation of manual PDF.

Actual result:
----

pdflatex error:
```
LaTeX Warning: Reference `app:010' on page 216 undefined on input line 16.


LaTeX Warning: Reference `app:011' on page 216 undefined on input line 17.


LaTeX Warning: Reference `app:012' on page 216 undefined on input line 18.

[216]

! Package pdfpages Error: Cannot find file `APPNOTE_010_Verilog_to_BLIF.pdf'.

See the pdfpages package documentation for explanation.
Type  H <return>  for immediate help.
 ...                                              
                                                  
l.22 ...e{plain}]{APPNOTE_010_Verilog_to_BLIF.pdf}
                                                  
!  ==> Fatal error occurred, no output PDF file produced!
Transcript written on manual.log.
make: *** [Makefile:861: manual] Error 1
```

Note
----

FWIW I have also manually run `appnotes.sh` in `manual/`.  I still get the same error.
code_blocks:
